pi_items.source: Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_campaigns with campaign_id='PSHLTH26' succeeded, SELECT returned 'PSHLTH26' without truncation. Schema confirms vicidial_campaigns.campaign_id is varchar(8); 'PSHLTH26' is exactly 8 chars. See evidence/07_db_operations_test.txt line 4.
Live DB test: INSERT+SELECT returned exact name. Schema shows campaign_name is varchar(40); this string is 34 chars. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 7.
Live DB test: campaign created with dial_method='RATIO', SELECT confirmed. RATIO is a valid Vicidial dial method (Ratio/Predictive dialing). See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 9.
Live DB test: INSERT with auto_dial_level='1.5', SELECT returned '1.5'. Schema shows varchar(6). See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 10.

Live DB test confirmed. Schema shows campaign_recording is enum('NEVER','ONDEMAND','ALLCALLS','ALLFORCE'), so ALLCALLS is valid. Original metadata used wrong column name 'campaign_rec' which was corrected to 'campaign_recording' during live testing. See evidence/08_schema_campaigns.txt line 25, evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 11.
Live DB test: INSERT with campaign_cid='8005550126', SELECT confirmed. Schema shows varchar(20). See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 12.
Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_lists with list_id='8800' succeeded. Schema shows bigint(14) unsigned. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 18.
Live DB test confirmed. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 19.

Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_scripts with script_id='PS_ENROLL' succeeded. Schema shows varchar(10); 'PS_ENROLL' is 9 chars. campaign_script field is also varchar(10) so assignment fits. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 25.
Live DB test confirmed. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 26.

These are standard Vicidial variable tokens documented in Vicidial admin. Live test confirmed script_text 'Hello --A--first_name--B-- --A--last_name--B--' was stored and retrieved correctly. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 28.

Live DB test: INSERT with status='ENROLD', status_name='Enrolled Successfully', sale='Y', human_answered='Y' succeeded. SELECT confirmed all values. Schema confirms status varchar(6) (ENROLD=6 chars), sale and human_answered are enum('Y','N'). See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt lines 32-41.
Schema confirms DECLIN fits varchar(6). Status flags (human_answered='Y', sale='N' default) are valid enum values. Not explicitly INSERT-tested but same table/schema as ENROLD which succeeded.
Schema confirms CALLBK fits varchar(6). scheduled_callback is enum('Y','N') per schema evidence/08_schema_statuses.txt line 13.
Schema confirms NOELIG fits varchar(6). human_answered is enum('Y','N').
Schema confirms HANGUP fits varchar(6). No special flags specified; all default to 'N' per schema.
Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_call_times with call_time_id='PS_HOURS' succeeded. Schema shows varchar(10); 'PS_HOURS' is 8 chars. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 44.
Live DB test confirmed. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 45.

Live DB test: INSERT with ct_default_start='0900' stored as integer 900 in MySQL. SELECT returns '900' not '0900'. The metadata value '0900' is the 4-digit representation; Vicidial stores/displays as integer. Both represent 9:00 AM. The agent must enter '0900' in the UI field. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 46.
Live DB test: INSERT with ct_default_stop='1800', SELECT returned '1800'. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 47.
Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_voicemail with voicemail_id='8800' succeeded. Schema shows varchar(10). See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 54.
Live DB test: stored in 'fullname' column. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 55.
Live DB test confirmed. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 56.
Live DB test: INSERT INTO vicidial_inbound_groups with group_id='PS_INBOUND' succeeded. Schema shows varchar(20); 'PS_INBOUND' is 10 chars. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 60.
Live DB test confirmed. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 61.
Live DB test confirmed on inbound group PS_INBOUND. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 64.
Live DB test confirmed. Inbound group PS_INBOUND has after_hours_voicemail='8800'. See evidence/10_export_result_output.txt line 65.

Live DB test: INSERT with campaign_id='PSHLTH26', status='NA', attempt_delay=1800, attempt_maximum=4, active='Y' succeeded. SELECT confirmed all values. Schema shows attempt_delay is smallint(5) default 1800, attempt_maximum is tinyint(3) default 2. See evidence/07_db_operations_test.txt line 24, evidence/10_export_result_output.txt lines 70-74.

Schema confirms validity: attempt_delay smallint(5) can hold 900, attempt_maximum tinyint(3) can hold 6 (max 127), active enum('Y','N'). Same table structure as NA rule which was INSERT-tested successfully.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires setting up a complete blended campaign in Vicidial. All objects should be created via the Vicidial Admin GUI at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php (User: 6666, Password: andromeda). The correct campaign ID is PSHLTH26 (exactly 8 characters, the maximum for vicidial_campaigns.campaign_id varchar(8)). The campaign must have: name 'PacificShield Open Enrollment 2026', active Y, dial_method RATIO, auto_dial_level 1.5, campaign_recording ALLCALLS (note: the DB column is 'campaign_recording' not 'campaign_rec'), campaign_cid 8005550126. List 8800 should be created and leads imported from /home/ga/Documents/VicidialData/enrollment_leads.csv (50 rows in Vicidial standard tab-delimited format, 30 columns per row, 7167 bytes, owned by ga:ga). Script PS_ENROLL must contain the Vicidial variable tokens --A--first_name--B-- and --A--last_name--B-- and be assigned to the campaign via campaign_script field. Five campaign statuses must be added: ENROLD (sale Y, human_answered Y), DECLIN (human_answered Y), CALLBK (scheduled_callback Y, human_answered Y), NOELIG (human_answered Y), HANGUP (no special flags). All status codes are exactly 6 characters (the max for varchar(6)). Call Time PS_HOURS must have ct_default_start=0900 and ct_default_stop=1800 (stored as integers 900 and 1800 in MySQL). Weekend fields (saturday/sunday start/stop) should all be 0 (closed). Voicemail box 8800 must have fullname='PacificShield VM', pass='7890', active='Y'. Inbound Group PS_INBOUND must reference call_time_id=PS_HOURS and have after_hours_action=VOICEMAIL with after_hours_voicemail=8800. The campaign must have allow_closers=Y and closer_campaigns containing 'PS_INBOUND'. Lead recycling: status NA with attempt_delay=1800, attempt_maximum=4, active=Y; status B with attempt_delay=900, attempt_maximum=6, active=Y. User 6666 has been pre-granted all necessary permissions (user_level=9, all modify_* flags=1). The environment starts with 0 campaigns, 0 active lists, and the admin dashboard visible in Firefox.
